positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical graphic illustration featuring a stylized celestial crescent moon intertwined with abstracted botanical and geometric cosmic foliage. The style must be a fusion of minimalist linocut etching and modern vector artwork. Use a high-contrast, sophisticated color palette of deep midnight indigo, muted metallic gold, and crisp off-white. The composition must be central, clean, and optimized for apparel printing, emphasizing strong, crisp silhouettes and negative space. The design should have an elegant, symmetrical, and timeless aesthetic, resembling a premium ornamental stencil design. Flat, clean lighting, graphic design art.
